{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Badari Desert
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Badari Desert]] contains a huge sandstone temple.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] walked bears from the canyon at the edge of the [[Badari Desert]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
